rationale: I verified the implementation against each frozen Task 4a obligation and find it faithful, in-scope, and free of reinterpretation. (a) Inventory: PACKAGE_ROOTS is exactly the five spine packages and PACKAGE_ROOTS_EXCLUDE exactly the three sibling products, with test-inventory §7 mechanically discovering tracked package.json directories via a pinned no-shell `git ls-files` and proving discovered == union, disjointness, exact sorted arrays (AM-40). DOC_ROOTS, docs/runs + self-weave exclusions, the five CONTRACT_FILES (D31), LEDGER_SOURCES committed as an exact-final empty set with reviewed rationale (a defensible closed-inventory reading, pinned by a unit), RUN_SOURCES, five weaver ids with integer versions, REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS deep-frozen and proven deepEqual to the frozen normative table (git->[package-files,package-symbols], code->[package-modules], test->[package-manifests,test-files], doc->[doc-files], ledger->[contract-files,ledger-sources,run-sources]), and LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS with exact keys {module,node:module}, exact sorted pair values, deep-freeze of outer+inner, and mutation-attempt units leaving it unchanged (D32) — all present. (b) D17/AM-17: WEAVER_IMPL_FILES commits only git ({registry.mjs,git.mjs}) and code ({registry.mjs,code.mjs,util.mjs}) closures; test-inventory §4 proves every committed path exists; test-closure §1/§12 prove committed==derived closures directly against the real repo, including registry.mjs and inventory.mjs as leaves. (c) util.mjs: ONE classifier (classifyModuleLoads) + ONE resolver (resolveRelativeSpecifier) shared by deriveAcceptedClosure and code.mjs, with test-closure §9 proving uniqueness by scanning all clotho modules for competing definitions, asserting code.mjs imports the shared resolver and deriveAcceptedClosure's body calls both (AM-34 test 19; the Task 5 advisory scanner is correctly deferred). The dependency-free lexer masks comments/strings/templates/regexes with a previous-significant-token regex-vs-division discipline covering control-head parens, block-vs-object braces, postfix ++/--, keywords (return/case/await/yield), `of` in for-heads, and comment-spanning contexts — all pinned by units. The Phase-1 export grammar is exactly the four forms; unsupported categories (default, export*, lists, destructuring, let/var, multi-declarator) each warn with no symbol. The walker rejects root escape, symlinked roots/components/ancestors, and symlinked entries (fail-closed throw, not skip). The counted iterator counts only on completed consumption, records exhaustion only on natural completion, exposes accounting only via the driver-held accessor (units prove partial-not-counted, full-counted-once, cardinality, and non-reachability from the iterable including symbol-keyed probes). physicalContainment lstats every original-order component before collapse (AM-41(c) mirrored), rejects symlinked roots/parents/escapes, never follows symlinks to decide; units cover symlinked allowed root, nested parent, escape-via-symlink, plain-path acceptance. The git wrapper allowlists exactly the five subcommand shapes with strict order/count, path-arg canonicality, execFileSync with shell:false, dropped caller options, and neutralized GIT_DIR-family env — with a real-repo unit proving an inherited GIT_DIR cannot redirect the runner. AM-41: the profile is enforced with the stable `unsupported-module-lexical-profile` diagnostic; b1–b6 each fail closed (bare CR/U+2028/U+2029; non-leading or second hashbang with one leading shebang admitted and stripped for LF/CRLF; <!-- and line-leading --> incl. whitespace-prefixed; string line-continuation and legacy/octal escapes with \0-not-digit admitted; string-literal specifier/alias names with and without from-clause; unterminated strings/comments/templates/regexes and truncated import/export/call forms), plus malformed \x/\u/\u{} handling without native RangeError leaks — all unit-pinned in test-util §14/§15/§20 and closure-level fail-closed in test-closure §14. (d) test-closure derives closures with the shared machinery through one harness used for both committed inventories and fixtures: per-form omission fixtures for all seven accepted forms plus keyword-alias and whitespace module.require variants, recursive mixed chain, cycle-once, apparently-unreachable dynamic import included, permitted merkle-dag helper recursively traversed, missing/extra/nonexistent-inventory failures, unresolved/ambiguous/non-regular/escape/forbidden/symlink (junction, must-run) fatal targets, entry-discipline checks, non-literal and comment/string no-edge, non-relative classification, .cjs/.js/.json explicit-extension traversal per D33 with extensionless still ambiguous, and allowExternal unable to widen beyond merkle-dag/. (e) git.mjs emits exactly the two frozen log invocations, first-result (earliest) selection, source_ref git:<same-sha>, full-SHA validation of every line with CRLF tolerated and bare CR/blank lines fatal, no-result warns with producer-attributed warnings; it validates its own path/symbol inputs before argv splice (spy-runner units), imports only ../registry.mjs (closure-consistent), and passes -S<symbol> as one verbatim token. (f) code.mjs consumes package-modules, threads symbol-level for seeded named imports (from every seeded export of the consumer), preserves no-export named-import as repository-file -> code-symbol, threads namespace/side-effect/non-seeded-named at file level across all four endpoint shapes, emits unrepresentable-consumer only for unresolvable specifiers (non-.mjs silent; symlink/escape/non-regular fail closed as physical-policy violations — a defensible fail-closed strengthening consistent with D21/D33 posture, unit-pinned), dedups, ignores unused imports and comment/string lookalikes, and produces byte-equal {edges,warnings} over two runs. Required fixtures (pkg-a/one.mjs alpha, aliased two-export importer, no-export importer, namespace import, unresolvable specifier, mock git recording exact args) are all present. Global constraints hold: zero runtime deps, ESM, node:-stdlib + clotho-relative + permitted vendor imports only, diff confined to clotho/ (spine read-only), and the deterministic gate passed all 15 checks. Minor non-blocking observations: header comments say "plan v13 (v12 + AM-40)" rather than v15 naming (cosmetic — AM-41 behavior is fully implemented and tested); DOC_WEAVER_EXCLUDE/GLOBAL_EXCLUDE are committed but consumed later by design (correct per task text, since no Task 4a code path walks doc roots); the b1 bare-CR check precedes string-interior CRLF nuance but matches the frozen 'anywhere' wording exactly. None of these affect faithfulness or scope. Orchestrator inventory, atomic publication, D34 re-derivation, and test/doc/ledger weavers are correctly absent (Tasks 4b/5).
